M#B_OE2TN.DESC: You have to predict if the total number points scored in the 2nd half will be odd or even, if the half is uncompleted this market will be void.

M#B_DNB2TN.NAME: DNB 2nd H
M#B_DNB2TN.DESC: You have to predict the winner of the 2nd half, if the half finishes as a draw all bets will be made void for this market, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_D2T.NAME: DC 2nd H
M#B_D2T.DESC: You have to predict the result of the 2nd half. There are 2 possible results: 1X-home or draw and X2-draw or away win. If the half is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_1X22TN.NAME: 1X2 2nd Half
M#B_1X22TN.DESC: You have to predict the outcome of the 2nd half (not including overtime), selections are 1-the home team, 2-the away team and X-draw. If the half is uncompleted this market will be void.

M#B_HFT.NAME: Halftime/Fulltime
M#B_HFT.DESC: You have to predict the outcome of the 1st half combined with the outcome of the match (regular time only).

M#B_OEAWAY.NAME: Odd/Even Away
M#B_OEAWAY.DESC: You have to predict if the number of goals scored by the away team during the entire match is going to be odd or even. If the away team does not score any goal the winning selection is even

M#B_OEHOME.NAME: Odd/Even Home
M#B_OEHOME.DESC: You have to predict if the number of goals scored by the home team during the entire match is going to be odd or even. If the home team does not score any goal the winning selection is even.

M#B_OU.NAME: Totals
M#B_OU.DESC: Predict if the total number of goals/points scored during the entire match will be over or under the spread indicated.

M#B_1X2HNDN.NAME: 1X2 (5.5 points)
M#B_1X2HNDN.DESC: You have to predict the whether the home or away winning margin will be above or below 6 points. Selections are 1-home wins by 6 or more points, X-either team wins by 5 or less points and 2-away team wins by 6 or more points.

M#B_MARGINFT.NAME: Margin Fulltime
M#B_MARGINFT.DESC: You have to predict the winning margin of the match for either team (including overtime).  The Sections are 1-5 points, 6-10 points, 11-15 points, 16-20 points, 21-25 points and 26 or more points.

M#B_MARGINAWAY.NAME: Margin Away
M#B_MARGINAWAY.DESC: You have to predict the winning margin of the match for the away team (including overtime).  The Sections are 1-5 points, 6-10 points, 11-15 points, 16-20 points, 21-25 points and 26 or more points.

M#B_MARGINHOME.NAME: Margin Home
M#B_MARGINHOME.DESC: You have to predict the winning margin of the match for the home team (including overtime).  The Sections are 1-5 points, 6-10 points, 11-15 points, 16-20 points, 21-25 points and 26 or more points.

M#B_12OU.NAME: 1-2 + Ov/Un
M#B_12OU.DESC: You have to predict the winner of the match and whether the number of points played is over or under the indicated spread.

M#B_OUAWAY4Q.NAME: O/U Away 4thQ
M#B_OUAWAY4Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Away team during the 4th quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OUAWAY3Q.NAME: O/U Away 3rdQ
M#B_OUAWAY3Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Away team during the 3rd quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OUHOME4Q.NAME: O/U Home 4thQ
M#B_OUHOME4Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Home team during the 4th quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OUHOME3Q.NAME: Ov/Un Home 3rdQ
M#B_OUHOME3Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Home team during the 3rd quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OUAWAY2Q.NAME: Ov/Un Away 2ndQ
M#B_OUAWAY2Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Away team during the 3rd quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OUHOME2Q.NAME: Ov/Un Home 2ndQ
M#B_OUHOME2Q.DESC: You have to predict if the total number of points scored by the Home team during the 2nd quarter will be over or under the spread indicated, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.

M#B_OTYESNO.NAME: Overtime Yes/No
M#B_OTYESNO.DESC: Predict if the game will go to Overtime

M#B_RACE50.NAME: Race to 50
M#B_RACE50.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 50 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE40.NAME: Race to 40
M#B_RACE40.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 40 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE30.NAME: Race to 30
M#B_RACE30.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 30 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE20.NAME: Race to 20
M#B_RACE20.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 20 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE15.NAME: Race to 15
M#B_RACE15.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 15 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE10.NAME: Race to 10
M#B_RACE10.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 10 points, including overtime

M#B_RACE5.NAME: Race to 5
M#B_RACE5.DESC: Predict which team wins race to 5 points, including overtime

M#B_DNB4Q.NAME: DNB 4thQ
M#B_DNB4Q.DESC: You have to predict the winner of the 4th quarter, if the quarter finishes as a draw all bets will be made void for this market, if the quarter is uncompleted this market will be made void.
